options.content: Monitoreo Micoope en Línea

targets.rawSql:
DECLARE @FROM datetime = $__timeFrom();
DECLARE @TO   datetime = $__timeTo();

WITH Transacciones AS (
    SELECT
        TK.username AS Usuario,
        TR.description_transac AS Tipo,
        COUNT(DISTINCT TK.token) AS Cantidad
    FROM [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_LogGeneration] TK

    LEFT JOIN [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Transaction_C1] TR
        ON TK.transaction_id = TR.id

    WHERE TK.created_at BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
      --AND TK.username = 'JGMARIA'

    GROUP BY
        TK.username,
        TR.description_transac
),

UsuarioInfo AS (
    SELECT
        username,
        MAX(phone) AS Telefono,
        MAX(mail) AS Correo
    FROM [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Users]
    GROUP BY username
),

CoopsDistinct AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        us.username,
        cope.cooperativa
    FROM [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Users_Extension] us

    INNER JOIN [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Cooperativa] cope
        ON cope.id = us.id_cooperativa

    WHERE cope.cooperativa <> 'Guadalupana'
),

Coops AS (
    SELECT
        username,
        STRING_AGG(cooperativa, ' | ') AS Cooperativa
    FROM CoopsDistinct
    GROUP BY username
)

SELECT
    C.Cooperativa,
    T.Usuario,
    U.Telefono,
    U.Correo,
    SUM(T.Cantidad) AS Total,
    STRING_AGG(
        CONCAT(T.Tipo, ': ', T.Cantidad),
        '  |  '
    ) AS Detalle
FROM Transacciones T

LEFT JOIN UsuarioInfo U
    ON T.Usuario = U.username

INNER JOIN Coops C
    ON T.Usuario = C.username

GROUP BY
    C.Cooperativa,
    T.Usuario,
    U.Telefono,
    U.Correo

ORDER BY
    Total DESC;

panels.title: Cantidad de Tokens Generados por Día

targets.rawSql:
/***** CANTIDAD DE TOKENS INGRESADOS EN MICOOPE EN LINEA por USUARIO Y FECHA *****/
DECLARE @FROM datetime = $__timeFrom();
DECLARE @TO   datetime = $__timeTo();

SELECT 
	cope.cooperativa AS Cooperativa,
	tk.username AS Usuario,
	COUNT (tk.token) AS [Cantidad]
FROM [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_LogValidation] tk
LEFT JOIN [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Users_Extension] us ON tk.username = us.username
LEFT JOIN [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Cooperativa] cope ON cope.id = us.id_cooperativa
WHERE [created_at] BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO 
GROUP BY cope.cooperativa, tk.username
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY Cantidad DESC

panels.title: Cantidad de Tokens Ingresados en Micoope en Línea

targets.rawSql:
/****** CANTIDAD DE TOKENS GENERADOS POR DÍA ******/

DECLARE @FROM datetime = $__timeFrom();
DECLARE @TO   datetime = $__timeTo();

WITH UsuarioReciente AS (
    SELECT
        usr.username,
        usr.phone,
        usr.mail,
        usr.created_at,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY usr.username
            ORDER BY usr.created_at DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Users] usr
),

ExtensionUnica AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        username,
        id_cooperativa
    FROM [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Users_Extension]
),

Datos AS (
    SELECT
        cope.cooperativa AS Cooperativa,
        tk.username AS Usuario,
        tr.description_transac AS Tipo,
        COUNT(DISTINCT tk.token) AS Cantidad,
        MAX(usr.phone) AS Telefono,
        MAX(usr.mail) AS Correo
    FROM [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_LogGeneration] tk

    LEFT JOIN [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Transaction_C1] tr
        ON tk.transaction_id = tr.id

    LEFT JOIN ExtensionUnica us
        ON tk.username = us.username

    LEFT JOIN [TokenMiCoope].[dbo].[Token_Cooperativa] cope
        ON cope.id = us.id_cooperativa

    LEFT JOIN UsuarioReciente usr
        ON usr.username = tk.username
       AND usr.rn = 1

    WHERE tk.[created_at] BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
      AND cope.cooperativa <> 'Guadalupana'
      AND (
            '${Cooperativa}' = 'All'
			OR cope.cooperativa IN (${Cooperativa:sqlstring})
            --OR cope.cooperativa IN (@COPE)
      )

    GROUP BY
        cope.cooperativa,
        tk.username,
        tr.description_transac
)

SELECT TOP 100
    Cooperativa,
    Usuario,
    MAX(Telefono) AS Telefono,
    MAX(Correo) AS Correo,
    SUM(Cantidad) AS Cantidad,
    STRING_AGG(
        CONCAT(ISNULL(Tipo, 'Sin tipo'), ': ', Cantidad),
        '  |  '
    ) AS Detalle
FROM Datos
GROUP BY
    Cooperativa,
    Usuario
HAVING SUM(Cantidad) >= 5
ORDER BY
    Cantidad DESC,
    Usuario;

panels.title: Cantidad de Tokens Generados por Día

panels.description: Verifica la cantidad de transacciones que recibe una misma cuenta ACH

targets.rawSql:
DECLARE @FROM VARCHAR(10);
DECLARE @TO VARCHAR(10);

SET @FROM = FORMAT(TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeFrom()), 'yyMMddHHmm');

SET @TO = FORMAT(TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME, $__timeTo()), 'yyMMddHHmm');



SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_TRANSACCIONES,
    NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO,
    NOMBRE_BANK,
    MIN(MONTOS) MINIMO,
    MAX(MONTOS) MAXIMO,
    SUM(MONTOS) TOTAL
FROM (
    SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST(MONTO AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA02_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK)
    WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO

    UNION ALL

    SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST(MONTO AS DECIMAL(18,2))
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA04_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK)
    WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

 	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST(MONTO AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA05_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST(MONTO AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA06_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST(MONTO AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA07_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

    SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST(MONTO AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA08_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

    SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA09_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA11_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA12_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS

	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA22_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA23_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA24_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA25_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA26_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA27_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK)

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA50_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA51_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA52_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA55_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA56_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
	UNION ALL

	SELECT CUENTA_DESTINO, NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO, NOMBRE_BANK, CAST( MONTO  AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS MONTOS
    FROM [FENANC].[dbo].[V_FA57_EB_GT01_ACH_EFECTUADA_SALIENTE] WITH (NOLOCK) 
	WHERE DATE_TIME BETWEEN @FROM AND @TO
	
    
) T
GROUP BY 
    NOM_CUENTA_DESTINO,
    NOMBRE_BANK
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY TOTAL_TRANSACCIONES DESC
OPTION (MAXDOP 1);

panels.title: Transacciones ACH
